metadata.name: Sugriva
metadata.primary_role: King of Kishkindha / Vanara leader / Key ally of Rama
metadata.divine_origin: Son of Surya (Sun God) — has golden-sun radiance

timelines.context_description: Sugriva after being dethroned by his brother Vali, hiding on Rishyamukha mountain, forms an alliance with Rama to defeat Vali and then marshals the Vanara army to search for Sita.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Golden-amber fur with rich sun-warm tones, lighter and more radiant than other Vanaras — reflecting his solar parentage
physical_appearance.height: Tall and imposing for a Vanara, regal bearing when confident, hunched and fearful when remembering Vali
physical_appearance.build: Strong muscular Vanara build but less massive than Vali, athletic and agile, shoulders slightly hunched from years in hiding
physical_appearance.facial_features: Noble simian face with large warm golden-amber eyes, broad nose, expressive mobile features that shift between hope, fear, and determination, a face that shows both leadership potential and the trauma of exile
physical_appearance.hair: Thick golden-amber fur around the face forming a shorter mane than Hanuman's, well-groomed once he regains his throne
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: A scar or mark from Vali's attacks on his body, golden solar aura that brightens significantly once he regains confidence after Rama's friendship

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: A royal red and gold garment wrapped around the waist, golden chest plate after becoming king
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: A golden crown of Kishkindha (after Vali's defeat), golden armlets, a sun-medallion necklace honoring his father Surya
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: A sturdy Vanara war club, a short bow — prefers close combat

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Warm but anxious, voice carries the trauma of fraternal betrayal, gains strength and authority after Rama's support
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Tenor-baritone — warm and golden-toned, wavers with anxiety in early encounters, strengthens into commanding authority later
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Initially speaks with the hesitation of a fugitive king, gains eloquence and authority after restoration, commands the Vanara army with booming directives, loyal and earnest when addressing Rama
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Anxiety transitioning to restored confidence, gratitude and fierce loyalty to Rama, the relief of a restored king

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Cinematic portrait of Vanara King Sugriva, age 35. Golden-amber fur gleaming with solar warmth. Noble simian face with large amber eyes showing determination. Strong athletic Vanara build with a golden chest plate and red-gold waist garment. Wearing the golden crown of Kishkindha and sun-medallion necklace. Standing on a mountain overlooking the Vanara army below. Golden sunset lighting emphasizing his solar heritage. 3D Pixar style, warm heroic lighting, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A warm male tenor-baritone with golden tones. Initially anxious, strengthening into commanding authority. Earnest and loyal. Age approximately 35 years.
